title: rubus × mutatus
intro: Rubus × mutatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or thimbleberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, resulting in a unique and adaptable plant with edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × mutatus include its high content of antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × mutatus fruits include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rubus × mutatus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, jams, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its sweet and tangy flavor.
